g.text: Figure 5Y. Event-study dashboard with explicit lead-term diagnostics

text.style: fill: #687782; font: 10.5px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: The right-side notes make the writing boundary visible: for execution share and procurement share, the lead bin is already non-trivial, so this figure supports timing intuition rather than a clean pre-trend claim.
